title: List of 2023 Hot Wheels (by Series)
summary:
2023 Hot Wheels #1-250
For 2023, the Hot Wheels mainline is numbered 1 through 250. This list lists the model grouped by series. For the official listing see List of 2023 Hot Wheels.

title: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush
summary: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush is an upcoming 2026 racing game from the developers behind Hot Wheels Unleashed & Hot Wheels Unleashed 2: Turbocharged. Developed and published by Milestone S.r.l., the game is set to be released on 24 September 2026, for the Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch 2 and Microsoft Windows.

title: Squinkies
summary:
center|200px
Squinkies were a toy line from the early 2010s created by Blip Toys. They were miniature rubber figures of many popular franchises of the time such as Marvel, Disney Princesses, Pixar, WWE and their own original designs. From 2011 to 2013 Hot Wheels Squinkies were sold.

title: World's Smallest Hot Wheels
summary: 200px|rightWorld's Smallest Hot Wheels is a series of Hot Wheels-themed toys manufactured and marketed by Super Impulse as one of their many brands in their World's Smallest product line introduced in 2017. These are approximately 1:180 scale versions of Hot Wheels cars and tracksets; the wheels on the cars turn and the cars run on tracks. Each car is no larger than a quarter.

title: Hot Wheels: Bash Arena
summary:
thumb|200px
Hot Wheels Bash Arena is a 2002 game for PC that challenges players to dodge and crash into opponents with performance varied Hot Wheels cars in a last car standing, interactive demolition derby-style competition. The game features 20 authentic Hot Wheels cars to unlock and control in six dynamic multi-level arenas full of hazards....

title: Takara Tomy
summary: Created page with "center|300px Takara Tomy is a brand name and manufacturer of toys, games, and other media based out of Katsushika, Japan formed with the March 1, 2006 merging of Takara founded by Yasuta Sato in 1955 and Tomy founded by Eiichirō Tomiyama in 1924. Hot Wheels has collaborated with and consulted the group on many occasions since 2002 to create new castings, series, and card games....
